shareViewer.title: PhD Atlas - Shared Application
shareViewer.subtitle: This shared workspace follows the pages and permission selected by the applicant.
shareViewer.viewPermissionHint: This link is view-only. Shared project data is visible, but changes are locked.
shareViewer.uploadPermissionHint: Upload the requested files below. Each item lists what is needed and the allowed formats.
shareViewer.editPermissionHint: This link can edit shared fields and upload files — similar to the applicant's workspace, limited to shared pages.
shareViewer.uploadHubSubtitle: Upload each required file. Limits and allowed types are listed per item so nothing is ambiguous.
shareViewer.uploadHubEmpty: No upload targets on this link
shareViewer.uploadHubEmptyHint: The applicant did not include checklist or task pages that accept files.
shareViewer.editSharedPageHint: Changes save back to the applicant's original project, limited to the pages included in this link.
shareViewer.materialsEditHint: Update material names, groups, statuses, details, and requested uploads.
shareViewer.tasksEditHint: Update task titles, dates, details, and completion state.
shareViewer.communicationsEditHint: Update correspondence records without sending real email from the shared page.
shareViewer.fundingEditHint: Maintain scholarships, fees, dates, statuses, and notes.
shareViewer.timelineEditHint: Edit manual timeline events; system-generated events stay synchronized automatically.
shareViewer.emptyMaterialsHint: The applicant has not added materials to this shared page yet.
shareViewer.emptyTasksHint: There are no shared tasks for this project.
shareViewer.emptyCommunicationsHint: Professor messages and notes will appear here when shared.
shareViewer.emptyFundingHint: Scholarships and fees have not been shared for this project.
shareViewer.emptyTimelineHint: Shared milestones will appear here as the project develops.
shareViewer.emptyVersionsHint: Uploaded versions will appear here when included in the share.
shareViewer.timelineReminderNote: Personal reminder from the shared project profile.
